pr_text:
## Title: Fix incorrect RACH resource type flag in UL SDU processing

### Summary
The `rx_sdu()` function in the eNB MAC scheduler was incorrectly passing `ra->rach_resource_type > 0` as a flags parameter to RLC data indication calls. This boolean expression was mistakenly added to the function signature where a bitmask flags field is expected. The incorrect flag could cause improper handling of uplink SDUs during random access procedures, potentially leading to protocol errors or dropped messag
